code: export class NameIconPurchaseOkParser{constructor(){this._iconId=0;this._diamonds=0;}flush(){this._iconId=0;this._diamonds=0;return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;this._iconId=wrapper.readInt();this._diamonds=wrapper.readInt();return true;}get iconId(){return this._iconId;}get diamonds(){return this._diamonds;}}
